basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bibinagar Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bibinagar (AIIMS Bibinagar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bibinagar (AIIMS Bibinagar) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 6 Guest Faculty Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 22-07-2026.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be intimated in due course of time

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree or above in respective discipline from a recognized university/ institute having a minimum 3 years of experience.
qualification.details: Guest Faculty: Postgraduate degree or above in respective discipline from a recognized university/ institute Minimum 3 years of experience

salary_details.guest faculty (communicative english): Rs. 1000/- Per Class/Hour -Maximum 40 hours during the Academic Session.
salary_details.guest faculty (telugu): Rs. 1000/- Per Class/Hour -Maximum 30 hours during the Academic Session.
salary_details.guest faculty (applied psychology): Rs. 1000/- Per Class/Hour -Maximum 60 hours during the Academic Session.
salary_details.guest faculty (applied nutrition & diete: Rs. 1000/- Per Class/Hour -Maximum 60 hours during the Academic Session.
salary_details.guest faculty (applied sociology): Rs. 1000/- Per Class/Hour -Maximum 60 hours during the Academic Session.
salary_details.guest faculty (statistics): Rs. 1000/- Per Class/Hour -Maximum 100 hours during the Academic Session.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for Selection Process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bibinagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aimsbibinagar.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bibinagar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Bibinagar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for Selection Process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bibinagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.aimsbibinagar.edu.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bibinagar (AIIMS Bibinagar), a prestigious medical institution in India. They are inviting applications for various Guest Faculty positions.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Guest Faculty. There are multiple specialized Guest Faculty positions available across different disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies available for the Guest Faculty posts in AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026, with one vacancy for each specialized subject.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the AIIMS Bibinagar Guest Faculty posts is Offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send the hard copy to the specified address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bibinagar Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving hard copies of filled-in applications for the Guest Faculty posts at AIIMS Bibinagar is 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Guest Faculty posts at AIIMS Bibinagar?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Guest Faculty posts at AIIMS Bibinagar is 64 years as of the last date of application.

faq.question: Q7. What is the required qualification for Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree or above in the respective discipline from a recognized university/institute, along with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for Guest Faculty at AIIMS Bibinagar?
faq.answer: The salary for Guest Faculty is Rs. 1000/- Per Class/Hour. The maximum hours vary per subject during the academic session, ranging from 30 to 100 hours.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for these Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: To apply, download the application form from www.aimsbibinagar.edu.in, fill it, attach required documents, and send the hard copy to "The Chairperson, Recruitment Cell, AIIMS, Bibinagar, Telangana-508126" before 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is AIIMS Bibinagar located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Bibinagar is located in Bibinagar, within the Hyderabad Metropolitan Region (HMR), Telangana, with the pincode 508126. It is a central government institution.
